ddl.value: ("page_subscriber"."channel_type" = 'email' AND "page_subscriber"."email" IS NOT NULL AND "page_subscriber"."webhook_url" IS NULL) OR ("page_subscriber"."channel_type" = 'webhook' AND "page_subscriber"."webhook_url" IS NOT NULL AND "page_subscriber"."email" IS NULL)
ddl.name: page_subscriber_channel_check

ddl.value: "page_component"."type" = 'monitor' AND "page_component"."monitor_id" IS NOT NULL OR "page_component"."type" = 'static' AND "page_component"."monitor_id" IS NULL
ddl.name: page_component_type_check
